skills.name: kit-hooks
skills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create a hook", "add a hook", "write a PreToolUse hook", "implement a SessionStart hook", "block tool access", "validate tool use", "add automation on stop", or mentions hook events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, Notification).
